title: thelymitra longifolia
intro: Thelymitra longifolia, also known as the broad-leaved sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelymitra longifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, Thelymitra longifolia is often used as a dried extract or tincture, and it is also used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and salves, to support skin health and wound recovery.
